abilities.name: Discordant Repair

raw.official description: Zenyatta gains 10% lifesteal against enemies affected by Discord Orb.

warnings: Damage has multiple components and only the first number was parsed.

abilities.name: Dual Harmony

raw.official description: Gain a 2nd Harmony Orb but they both heal for 70% effectiveness.
raw.ability details:
* Healing penalty applies regardless of how many orbs are currently in use.
* Each orb checks line of sight and times out separately.

warnings: Damage has multiple components and only the first number was parsed.

raw.shot type: [[File:Ability target ui.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Targeted ability|Targeted ]] Targeted
raw.official description: Zenyatta heals Orb of Harmony targets for 40% of his damage dealt to Orb of Discord targets.
raw.ability details:
* ''Removed in Season 18.''
* Heals for 20 per Orb of Destruction and 24 per Snap Kick.
** A full volley can heal up to 75 HP (90 HP with the Focused Destruction perk).
* This healing is in addition to the base healing from Orb of Harmony.

raw.official description: Secondary fire charges 20% faster and can store 1 extra Orb of Destruction.
raw.fire rate:
1 orb per 0.42 seconds (charging)
1 shot per 0.144 seconds (firing)
0.6 seconds recovery
raw.ability details:
* Damage per second: 119.05 while firing (86.64 overall w/reload)
* Damage per second: 148.81 while firing (w/ discord) (112.82 overall w/reload)
* Max damage per volley increased from 250 to 300.

fire_rate.raw:
1 orb per 0.42 seconds (charging)
1 shot per 0.144 seconds (firing)
0.6 seconds recovery

raw.official description: While using Transcendence, apply Discord Orb to all enemies within range.
raw.ability details:
* ''Removed in Reign of Talon Season 1''
* Discord Orbs remain attached to the targets only as long as they remain in the area.
* Requires line of sight. Cannot apply through enemy [[barrier]]s or terrain.

abilities.name: Orb of Harmony
shot_type: [[File:Ability target ui.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Targeted ability|Targeted ]] Targeted [[File:Ability-dva7.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Projectile|Projectile ]] Projectile

raw.shot type:
[[File:Ability target ui.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Targeted ability|Targeted ]] Targeted
[[File:Ability-dva7.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Projectile|Projectile ]] Projectile
raw.official description: Launch this orb at an ally to heal them.
raw.heal: 35 health per second
raw.ability details:
* Orb of Harmony remains on the target indefinitely, while they stay within line of sight of Zenyatta.
** One Orb of Harmony can be active at a time.
** The orb is removed if the line of sight to the target is obstructed for more than 5 seconds.
** Barriers do not block line of sight neither for targeting nor maintaining the effect.
* Multiple orbs from different Zenyattas stack additively.

heal.raw: 35 health per second

abilities.name: Orb of Discord
shot_type: [[File:Ability target ui.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Targeted ability|Targeted ]] Targeted [[File:Ability-dva7.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Projectile|Projectile ]] Projectile

raw.shot type:
[[File:Ability target ui.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Targeted ability|Targeted ]] Targeted
[[File:Ability-dva7.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Projectile|Projectile ]] Projectile
raw.official description: Launch this orb at an enemy to increase the damage they take.
raw.ability details:
* Orb of Discord remains on the target indefinitely, while they stay within line of sight of Zenyatta.
** One Orb of Discord can be active at a time.
** The orb is removed if the line of sight to the target is obstructed for more than 1.5 seconds.
** [[Barrier]]s prevent applying Orb of Discord but do not break line of sight to a target that is already affected by it.
* When Orb of Discord is removed from a target, they cannot be targeted by it again for 6 seconds.
** A UI element with a timer will be displayed while aiming toward a target the orb cannot be applied to.

raw.shot type: [[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement
raw.official description: Activate and hold Double Jump to hover for up to 3 seconds.
raw.ability details:
* Jump can be held to hover even without double jumping.
* Double jumping may marginally increase or decrease levitation height depending on timing.

raw.fire rate: 2.5 shots/s
raw.reload time: 1.5 seconds animation
raw.dps: 125 while firing (108.7 overall w/reload) 156.25 while firing w/ discord
raw.ability details:
* Damage per second: 125 while firing (108.7 overall w/reload)
* Damage per second: 156.25 (w/ discord) (135.87 overall w/reload)

fire_rate.raw: 2.5 shots/s

raw.shot type: [[File:Quick_melee.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Melee|Melee ]] Melee
raw.official description: Quick melee damage increased by 50%, and its knockback is significantly increased.
raw.ability details:
* Results in up to ~7 meters knockback on flat ground.
* Vertical component of the knockback is reduced the further the target is.

raw.shot type: [[File:Quick_melee.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Melee|Melee ]] Melee
raw.official description: Snap Kick's knockback distance is increased by 30%.
raw.ability details:
* ''Removed in Season 18.''
*Increases horizontal knockback by 30%, from 15 m/s to 19.5 m/s.
*Increases vertical knockback by 30%, from 5.0 m/s to 6.5 m/s.
*Results in up to ~9.1 meters knockback on flat ground (was ~7 m).
*Vertical knockback scales with distance from target.
*This perk does not affect Snap Kick's damage.
*Can displace light heroes more effectively into environmental hazards.

abilities.name: Transcendence
shot_type: [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect

raw.shot type: [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect
raw.official description: Become invulnerable, move faster, and heal nearby allies.
raw.heal: 400 health per second
raw.ability details: * Zenyatta becomes [[invulnerable]], preventing damage and making him immune to [[slow]]s, [[stun]]s and [[knockdown]]s. ** Additionally, activating Transcendence removes [[damage over time]], [[anti-heal]] and [[File:Ability Sombra Hack.png|sub|link=Sombra#Hack|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sombra#Hack|Hack]] from Zenyatta. ** Zenyatta can still be affected by other negative [[status effect]]s, such as knockbacks and gravity effects. * Zenyatta cannot shoot or use abilities during Transcendence. * [[File:Ability-zenyatta1.png|middle|link=Zenyatta#Orb of Destruction|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Zenyatta#Orb of Destruction|Orb of Destruction]]'s ammunition is restored upon activation. * Transcendence does not work through walls or barriers. If allies are in the AoE but behind walls, they will not be healed. * Zenyatta cannot capture objectives while casting Transcendence. He can still contest them, however. * Transcendence's [[movement speed]] buff does not count towards global movement speed buff cap.

heal.raw: 400 health per second
